cases.question: Build an executive overview dashboard for the marketplace: total gross merchandise value, the total number of orders, the average order value, and the monthly GMV trend.
cases.sql:
SELECT SUM(price) AS total_gmv FROM olist_order_items; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders; SELECT (SELECT SUM(price) FROM olist_order_items) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM olist_orders), 0) AS avg_order_value; WITH monthly_gmv AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS purchase_month,
    SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) AS gmv
  FROM olist_order_items oi
  JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
  WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  purchase_month,
  gmv,
  LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY purchase_month) AS prev_month_gmv,
  gmv - LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY purchase_month) AS mom_change,
  CASE
    WHEN LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY purchase_month) IS NOT NULL
     AND LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY purchase_month) <> 0
    THEN (gmv - LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY purchase_month)) / LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY purchase_month)
  END AS mom_growth_rate
FROM monthly_gmv
ORDER BY purchase_month;

cases.question: For each customer state, what is the top product category by revenue?
cases.sql:
WITH state_category_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    c.customer_state,
    p.product_category_name,
    SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) AS total_revenue
  FROM olist_customers c
  JOIN olist_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  WHERE p.product_category_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.customer_state, p.product_category_name
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    customer_state,
    product_category_name,
    total_revenue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_state ORDER BY total_revenue DESC) AS rn
  FROM state_category_revenue
)
SELECT
  customer_state,
  product_category_name AS top_product_category,
  total_revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY customer_state;
